reforms.description: New legislation introduced in August 1990 provides a framework for reorganising the private pension system, aiming to increase portability and security of private pensions, which may enhance job mobility and capital market activity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the private pension system can enhance job mobility and potentially increase savings in capital markets, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: New legislation was introduced to reorganise the private pension system.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform addresses significant issues in the pension system, aiming to improve its efficiency and effectiveness, which is crucial for long-term economic stability.
reforms.source_quote: In order to ease a shift from public to private pension provision, new legislation, introduced in August 1990, provides the framework for a reorganisation of the private pension system.
